product_overview: GigFlow is a CRM-style leads dashboard for managing sales pipelines, viewing lead statistics, and working with lead records. Users can sign in to access a protected dashboard that surfaces lead data and analytics.
core_goals: Sign in to access the protected dashboard
View lead statistics and lead lists in one place
Edit existing lead records from the dashboard

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allows a user to authenticate with email and password to access the application.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard

features.name: View Dashboard
features.description: Displays lead analytics and a list of leads for authenticated users.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View lead statistics -> View leads list

features.name: Edit Leads
features.description: Lets an authenticated user update lead information from the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View leads list -> Select a lead to edit -> Update lead details -> Save changes -> See updated lead information

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials
